turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, hello. I had an appendectomy at your clinic last week. I'm calling because the pain has come back and there's some discharge from the wound. Should I be worried?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry you're experiencing that. That does sound like something that needs prompt attention. Could you tell me your name and your surgeon's name?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: My name is Deepak Jadhav. The surgery was done by Dr. Hemant Shirke.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Jadhav, wound discharge after surgery is something that genuinely needs to be assessed by our clinical or surgical nursing team — I'm not equipped to advise on post-operative complications from this line. I'm going to connect you to our staff immediately so they can loop in Dr. Shirke's team. Please hold.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, please hurry, I'm quite uncomfortable.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely, transferring you right now. Please hold on.
